rules: prefer repository code and docs for local architecture truths
prefer exact current workflow files and package scripts over memory
prefer the configured MCP servers for up-to-date external documentation and platform context when they fit the task
prefer the configured Supabase MCP server for safe project introspection before using speculative database assumptions
do not rely on memory alone for deployment, auth, or Supabase behavior when repo evidence is available

must: update docs/exec_plans.md before or during substantial work
delegate implementation by ownership boundary when the task spans multiple layers and delegation is available
translate conceptual harness roles into the correct sub-agent type
route OpenAI documentation lookups through openaiDeveloperDocs when applicable
send completed work through review before presenting it as final
must_not: claim work is complete before required verification passes
expand AGENTS.md into a large instruction dump
rewrite frontend interaction behavior except for small contract-preserving support changes
change persistence or business rules without backend coordination

owns: evidence for pass or fail status
must_not: declare architecture or security review complete in place of reviewer sign-off

checks: contract consistency between APIs and UI

rules: spawn workers for implementation tasks with clear file ownership
spawn explorers for repository discovery, tracing, and read-only review
spawn QA as explorer for verification design, result checking, and evidence gathering
use worker for QA only when adding or updating dedicated test assets is the task itself
use default for reviewer work only when explorer-level review is insufficient
do not assume permanent sub-agent connectivity; assign and spawn per task

required_after_code_changes: run focused tests for touched behavior when tests exist or are added
run npm run verify:harness after harness-doc or harness-script changes
run npm run build after meaningful application changes unless the task is docs-only
run npm test or focused vitest coverage when behavior-critical server or UI logic changes
required_before_completion: review changed files against this standards document
summarize any remaining risk or skipped verification
confirm no contract or boundary drift was introduced silently
